vars.name: AFK_ALLOW_PROJECT_MCP
vars.description: Allow loading MCP configuration from <cwd>/.mcp.json. Disabled by default — opt-in to mitigate config-injection risks.

vars.name: AFK_AUTO_ROUTING
vars.description: Auto-route bare slash inputs to matching skills. Applies to interactive, chat, telegram, and daemon surfaces.

vars.name: AFK_BANNER_PLAIN
vars.description: Suppress the ANSI-colored banner at REPL startup. Useful for non-TTY captures and CI logs.

vars.name: AFK_BROWSER_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
vars.description: Comma-separated allowlist of URL host globs. When set, browser_open and any navigation that targets a host outside the list returns status: blocked_by_policy. Unset means no allowlist (permissive). Patterns use simple `*` glob matching against the URL host. Combines with AFK_BROWSER_BLOCKED_DOMAINS — block wins.

vars.name: AFK_BROWSER_BACKEND
vars.description: Select the browser provider backend. Phase 1 supports only `playwright`. Reserved for future `cdp` / `mcp` adapters. Unset defaults to `playwright`.

vars.name: AFK_BROWSER_BLOCKED_DOMAINS
vars.description: Comma-separated blocklist of URL host globs. Browser navigation that matches any entry returns status: blocked_by_policy regardless of the allowlist.

vars.name: AFK_BROWSER_CONFIG
vars.description: Absolute path to an alternate browser config file. Overrides the default ~/.afk/config/browser.json lookup. Useful for per-project overrides in CI.

vars.name: AFK_BROWSER_DOM_SNAPSHOTS
vars.description: Phase 2 opt-in: when set to 1, every browser_act writes a gzipped DOM snapshot sidecar under ~/.afk/state/witness/<sid>/browser/dom-snapshots/. Off by default because snapshots are large; useful for post-mortem analysis of failed actions.

vars.name: AFK_BROWSER_HEADLESS
vars.description: Override the default headless mode for native browser-control tools. `1`/`true` forces headless; `0`/`false` forces headed. When unset the default is headless for daemon and subagent surfaces and headed for repl/interactive — so an operator can watch the agent work in REPL mode.

vars.name: AFK_COMPACT_KEEP_LAST_TURNS
vars.description: Number of recent turns the compactor keeps verbatim during /compact. Default tuned in compact-handler.ts.

vars.name: AFK_COMPACT_MODEL
vars.description: Override the model used by the /compact summarizer. Falls back to a cheap default (haiku-class).

vars.name: AFK_DAEMON_CWD
vars.description: Working directory used by the daemon process for spawned agent sessions.

vars.name: AFK_DAEMON_TASK
vars.description: Default task description for the daemon. Falls back to afk.config.json daemon.task.

vars.name: AFK_DAEMON_TASK_ID
vars.description: Task identifier the daemon uses to scope its state directory and telemetry.

vars.name: AFK_DEBUG
vars.description: Enable verbose debug logging across the codebase. Accepts 1 to enable.

vars.name: AFK_DEBUG_CLIPBOARD
vars.description: Debug bracketed-paste and image-paste handling in the interactive REPL.

vars.name: AFK_DEBUG_COMPOSITOR
vars.description: Gate compositor phase-boundary traces to stderr; any truthy value enables.

vars.name: AFK_DEFAULT_SUBAGENT_MODEL
vars.description: Override the default model used when a subagent is dispatched without an explicit model.

vars.name: AFK_DEMO_CLEAN
vars.description: Explicit opt-in to capture-mode. When set to 1, suppresses high-frequency repaint drivers (spinner ticker, live thinking-preview) so recorded artifacts contain each state once instead of once per timer tick.

vars.name: AFK_DIFF_LINES
vars.description: Maximum number of diff lines shown in the inline diff render during write_file tool calls. Set to 0 for no cap. Non-integer values are silently ignored and the default applies.

vars.name: AFK_DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHE
vars.description: Disable Anthropic prompt caching when set to 1/true/yes/on. Unset = caching enabled.

vars.name: AFK_DUMP_PROMPT
vars.description: Write the resolved system prompt to a file at startup. Accepts a path or 1 for default location.

vars.name: AFK_EFFORT
vars.description: Effort hint guiding adaptive-thinking depth, forwarded as Anthropic output_config.effort (model-gated; ignored where unsupported). Accepts low | medium | high | xhigh | max.

vars.name: AFK_FRAMEWORK_DIR
vars.description: Override the AFK agent-framework directory used for telemetry and briefs. Default: $AFK_HOME/agent-framework/.

vars.name: AFK_HOME
vars.description: Override the AFK home directory. Default: ~/.afk/.

vars.name: AFK_INTERNAL
vars.description: Tier gate. Set to exactly `1` to unlock — only the literal string "1" unlocks (other truthy values like "true"/"yes" leave the tier locked). When unlocked, skills tagged `audience: 'internal'` (e.g. /audit-fit, harvest/distill plugins) become visible at end-user surfaces (slash-command list, --help, tab-complete, system-prompt skill manifest). Default unset = public tier — internal skills are hidden. Not an access-control boundary; it gates surfacing, not the underlying registry.

vars.name: AFK_LOCAL_API_KEY
vars.description: Placeholder API key for local Anthropic-compatible servers (vllm-mlx, etc.). Set when AFK_LOCAL_BASE_URL is configured.

vars.name: AFK_LOCAL_BASE_URL
vars.description: Base URL for a self-hosted Anthropic-compatible server. When set, routes traffic away from api.anthropic.com.

vars.name: AFK_MAX_BUDGET_USD
vars.description: Per-turn USD budget ceiling. Aborts the turn when projected spend would exceed this.

vars.name: AFK_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS
vars.description: Cap on output tokens per turn. Falls back to provider default when unset.

vars.name: AFK_MAX_TOKENS
vars.description: Cap on total tokens per turn (input + output). Default 4096.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL
vars.description: Default model for agent turns. Accepts slot names (small, medium, large), legacy aliases (opus, sonnet, haiku), the fixed-id fable alias (Claude Fable 5), or full model IDs.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_LARGE
vars.description: Bind the "large" capability tier (most capable) to a model id/alias. Overrides afk.config.json models.large.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_LARGE_API_KEY
vars.description: Per-slot API key for the "large" tier (Stage 2). Overrides global credentials for this tier only.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_LARGE_BASE_URL
vars.description: Per-slot endpoint base URL for the "large" tier (Stage 2). Anthropic Messages base or OpenAI-compatible base per the tier provider.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_MEDIUM
vars.description: Bind the "medium" capability tier (general-use) to a model id/alias. Overrides afk.config.json models.medium.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_MEDIUM_API_KEY
vars.description: Per-slot API key for the "medium" tier (Stage 2). Overrides global credentials for this tier only.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_MEDIUM_BASE_URL
vars.description: Per-slot endpoint base URL for the "medium" tier (Stage 2). Anthropic Messages base or OpenAI-compatible base per the tier provider.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_SMALL
vars.description: Bind the "small" capability tier (cheap/fast) to a model id/alias. Overrides afk.config.json models.small.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_SMALL_API_KEY
vars.description: Per-slot API key for the "small" tier (Stage 2). Overrides global credentials for this tier only.

vars.name: AFK_MODEL_SMALL_BASE_URL
vars.description: Per-slot endpoint base URL for the "small" tier (Stage 2). Anthropic Messages base or OpenAI-compatible base per the tier provider.

vars.name: AFK_OPENAI_BASE_URL
vars.description: Base URL override for the OpenAI-compatible provider. Used for local shims (mlx_lm.server, Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio). The OpenAI SDK appends `/chat/completions` itself — a value ending in `/chat/completions` will be stripped at config-load time with a one-shot warning.

vars.name: AFK_OPENAI_CHATGPT_OAUTH
vars.description: Opt into using ChatGPT-subscription OAuth credentials from ~/.codex/auth.json (auth_mode: chatgpt) as OpenAI provider auth. Off by default. READ-ONLY: AFK never refreshes these tokens — re-run `codex` when the access token expires. Routes requests over the Responses API to the private ChatGPT backend (chatgpt.com/backend-api).

vars.name: AFK_OPENAI_USE_RESPONSES
vars.description: Opt the OpenAI-compatible provider into the OpenAI Responses API instead of Chat Completions for API-key sessions. Truthy values: 1, true, yes, on. The ChatGPT-subscription OAuth path uses Responses automatically regardless of this flag.

vars.name: AFK_PROMPT_CACHE_TTL
vars.description: TTL for Anthropic prompt-cache blocks. Accepts 5m or 1h.

vars.name: AFK_PROVIDER
vars.description: Force provider selection (anthropic | anthropic-direct | openai | openai-compatible | openai-codex). Overrides the model-name heuristic. Same surface as the --provider CLI flag; CLI flag wins when both are set.

vars.name: AFK_SESSION_ID
vars.description: Override the browser session ID used by the native browser-control tools. Defaults to 'default' for single-session use. Subagents inherit the parent's session by default. Set this when running multiple concurrent AFK processes that should each manage an isolated browser context.

vars.name: AFK_SESSIONSTART_COOLDOWN_MS
vars.description: Cooldown in milliseconds between SessionStart trigger fires in the daemon. Prevents thundering-herd on rapid restarts.

vars.name: AFK_SHELL_PASSTHROUGH
vars.description: Enable the interactive REPL `!cmd` / `!&cmd` shell-passthrough feature. On by default. Set to 0, false, off, or no (case-insensitive) to disable, so inputs beginning with ! are sent to the model as literal text instead of being executed as shell commands. Equivalent to the --no-shell-passthrough flag.

vars.name: AFK_SHELL_WRAPPER
vars.description: Set to 1 or true by the optional afk shell wrapper function (installed via `afk shell-init`). Signals that the parent shell has the wrapper active so the post-exit cd can fire.

vars.name: AFK_SHOW_DIFFS
vars.description: Show inline diffs in the tool-lane output for edit/write tool calls. 1 = on, 0 = off.

vars.name: AFK_SKILL_STREAM_VERBOSE
vars.description: Verbose streaming output when a skill is dispatched. Logs sub-agent setup, intermediate events, and final result.

vars.name: AFK_SPINNER_TIPS
vars.description: Show rotating tips in the loading spinner during long calls. 1 = on, 0 = off.

vars.name: AFK_STATE_DIR
vars.description: Override the AFK state directory. Default: $AFK_HOME/state/.

vars.name: AFK_SUGGEST_ENABLED
vars.description: Enable the LLM-backed ghost-text suggestion tier in the interactive REPL. Set to 1/true/yes/on to activate. Off by default.

vars.name: AFK_SUGGEST_GHOST
vars.description: Enable REPL ghost-text inline suggestions (Tier-1 history/dropdown + optional Tier-2 LLM). 1 = on (default), 0 = off. Set 0/false/off/no to disable all ghost text. Tier-2 LLM is separately gated by AFK_SUGGEST_ENABLED.

vars.name: AFK_SUGGEST_MODEL
vars.description: Override the small model used for REPL ghost-text suggestions. Falls back to AFK_COMPACT_MODEL or haiku-class for anthropic, or the session model for other providers.

vars.name: AFK_SYSTEM_PROMPT
vars.description: Raw operator-overlay prompt. Highest-priority overlay (over afk.config.json and AFK.md). Appended on top of the framework base (prompts/system-prompt.md) under an "# Operator configuration" header — it augments, never replaces, the base.

vars.name: AFK_TASK_BUDGET
vars.description: Per-task token budget ceiling. Aborts when cumulative usage would exceed it.

vars.name: AFK_TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHAT_IDS
vars.description: Comma-separated list of Telegram chat IDs allowed to interact with the bot. Required when the bot is running.

vars.name: AFK_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
vars.description: Alternative env var name for the Telegram bot token, accepted by the setup wizard.

vars.name: AFK_TELEGRAM_CWD
vars.description: Override the working directory used by the Telegram bot when spawning agent sessions.

vars.name: AFK_TELEGRAM_NOTIFY_MODE
vars.description: Outbound notification fan-out: primary (default — one chat), broadcast (every allowed chat), or custom (afk.config.json telegram.notify.targets). The afk.config.json telegram.notify.mode takes precedence.

vars.name: AFK_TELEGRAM_PRIMARY_CHAT_ID
vars.description: Default chat ID for outbound notifications (primary-mode routing). When unset, notifications go to the first private/DM chat in AFK_TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHAT_IDS. The afk.config.json telegram.notify block takes precedence.

vars.name: AFK_TELEGRAM_TRACE
vars.description: Set to 1 to dump raw bridge traffic between the agent and the Telegram bot — debugging only.

vars.name: AFK_TEMPERATURE
vars.description: Numeric temperature override for model sampling. Provider default if unset.

vars.name: AFK_THINKING
vars.description: Extended-thinking mode. Accepts adaptive | disabled | enabled:<N> | enabled:max. Defaults to the model-appropriate mode when unset (adaptive on current models).

vars.name: AFK_TIMEOUT_MS
vars.description: Per-turn timeout in milliseconds. Provider/SDK default if unset.

vars.name: AFK_TRACE_DISABLED
vars.description: Disable the agent trace subsystem entirely. Set to 1 to skip trace file writes.

vars.name: AFK_USER_CARD_MAX_ROWS
vars.description: Maximum number of visual rows emitted by renderUserCard before collapsing the remainder into a dim "…(N lines collapsed)" summary row. Defaults to 24. Non-integer or non-positive values are silently ignored and the default applies.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_AUTONAME
vars.description: Auto-rename worktree branches based on the first user message in interactive mode. 1 = on (default), 0 = off.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_BASE
vars.description: Override the base git ref for worktrees created with --worktree. By default AFK bases worktrees on the remote's default branch (e.g. origin/main), fetched fresh. Set this to pin a different ref, or to HEAD to base on the local checkout. Overridden per-session by --worktree-base.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_BOOT_PRUNE
vars.description: When set, the daemon prunes stale worktrees at boot in addition to the cron-driven sweep.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_BRANCH_PREFIX
vars.description: Branch-name prefix for AFK-managed worktrees. Default afk/. Set to empty string to drop the prefix.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_MAX_AGE_CLEAN
vars.description: Maximum age (in days) before a clean worktree is auto-pruned. Default 14.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_MAX_AGE_DIRTY
vars.description: Maximum age (in days) before a dirty worktree is auto-pruned. Default 30.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_PRUNE_DISABLE
vars.description: Disable the worktree prune job entirely. Useful for long-running tests.

vars.name: AFK_WORKTREE_SWEEP_ROOT
vars.description: Override the root directory under which AFK worktrees are tracked for pruning.

vars.name: AFK_WRITE_DENYLIST
vars.description: Comma-separated list of additional path globs that the write_file tool refuses to write to.

vars.name: AFK_WRITE_DIFF
vars.description: Show a diff preview before each write_file tool call. Defaults provider-controlled when unset.

vars.name: AGENT_AFK_ASCII
vars.description: Force the interactive REPL tool-lane renderer to ASCII-only glyphs instead of the default Unicode box-drawing set. Accepts 1/true/yes (case-insensitive). Useful for terminals whose font lacks ┃├╰├ glyphs.

vars.name: AGENT_SURFACE
vars.description: Internal surface marker propagated to subprocesses. Identifies which AFK surface (cli, telegram, daemon) spawned the process.

vars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
vars.description: Anthropic API key. Tier-1 credential — overrides keychain OAuth and CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.

vars.name: ASCIINEMA_REC
vars.description: Set to 1 by asciinema rec while a session is being recorded. Triggers capture-mode.

vars.name: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY
vars.description: Brave Search API subscription token, enabling web_scrape search mode. Free tier available at https://brave.com/search/api/. When unset, search mode returns an actionable error; markdown and raw modes are unaffected.

vars.name: CI
vars.description: Standard CI-detection convention. Auto-set by GitHub Actions, CircleCI, etc. Used to switch off TTY-only UX.

vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN
vars.description: Claude Code OAuth token. Tier-2 credential — used when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is unset; falls back to keychain.

vars.name: CLAUDE_MODEL
vars.description: Legacy alias for AFK_MODEL — supported for back-compat with pre-AFK_* deployments.

vars.name: CODEX_API_KEY
vars.description: Fallback OpenAI API key for the openai-compatible provider, read after OPENAI_API_KEY. Legacy name from the removed @openai/codex-sdk integration — prefer OPENAI_API_KEY.

vars.name: DEBUG
vars.description: Standard Node `debug`-package convention. When set to 1, enables verbose logging in several modules alongside AFK_DEBUG.

vars.name: FORCE_COLOR
vars.description: Standard Node convention. Force-enable ANSI color output even when stdout is not a TTY.

vars.name: HOME
vars.description: Standard Unix home directory. Used as the fallback when AFK_HOME is unset.

vars.name: NO_COLOR
vars.description: Standard convention (https://no-color.org). When set to any non-empty value, disables ANSI color output.

vars.name: NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER
vars.description: Disable the update-available notifier on CLI startup. Standard convention shared with many Node CLIs.

vars.name: NODE_ENV
vars.description: Standard Node environment marker. test | development | production. Used by routing-telemetry.ts to suppress test-time writes.

vars.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
vars.description: OpenAI API key for the openai-compatible provider (gpt-*, o1*, o3*, o4* models).

vars.name: PAGER
vars.description: Standard POSIX env var naming the user's preferred pager (with optional flags). Used by /transcript to render the full session in a scrollable viewer; falls back to `less -R` when unset.

vars.name: PATH
vars.description: System PATH. Read for executable resolution (git, gh, etc.) in tool handlers.

vars.name: SCRIPT
vars.description: Set by script(1) on BSD/macOS/Linux to the typescript filename while a terminal session is being recorded. Presence of a non-empty value triggers capture-mode.

vars.name: SHELL
vars.description: Standard POSIX env var pointing to the user's login shell binary. Used by shell-init and worktree commands to auto-detect the correct shell syntax for emitted wrapper code.

vars.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
vars.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Required to run the Telegram bot surface.

vars.name: TELEGRAM_DATA_DIR
vars.description: Override the directory where Telegram bot state is stored. Defaults to ~/.afk/state/telegram/.

vars.name: TELEGRAM_VERBOSE
vars.description: Set to 1 to log per-message details from the Telegram bot — chat IDs, message text, latency.

vars.name: VITEST
vars.description: Set automatically by Vitest. Used at runtime to short-circuit code paths that should not fire in tests.
